name: full-stack-development-mfe
description: Micro Frontend architecture: shell + 5 course MFEs

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "bgMagenta.bold,bgBlue.bold,bgYellow.bold,bgCyan.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgRed.bold" --names "SHELL,HTML,CSS,JS,REACT,NODE" "npm run dev --prefix shell" "npm run dev --prefix html" "npm run dev --prefix css" "npm run dev --prefix javascript" "npm run dev --prefix reactjs" "npm run dev --prefix nodejs"
scripts.install:all: npm i --prefix shell && npm i --prefix html && npm i --prefix css && npm i --prefix javascript && npm i --prefix reactjs && npm i --prefix nodejs
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix shell && npm run build --prefix html && npm run build --prefix css && npm run build --prefix javascript && npm run build --prefix reactjs && npm run build --prefix nodejs
